message:
docs: simplify architecture diagram — all arrows downward, no overlaps

Removed internal SDK→Graphviz/Zig edges that caused arrow congestion.
Graphviz and Zig sit in Core group as visual context without edges.
SDK fans out to 3 outputs with short labels (upload, write, render).
